chains.name: bnb-smart-chain
chains.description: BNB Smart Chain Mainnet — identified by the 'bsc' ENR field; dominant fork auto-selected

chains.name: bnb-smart-chain-testnet
chains.description: BNB Smart Chain Chapel Testnet — compound filter: 'bsc' ENR field AND non-mainnet fork hash. Run -discover to update forkHashes after Chapel upgrades.

chains.name: polygon-mainnet
chains.description: Polygon PoS Mainnet — fork hashes from bor ChainConfig (reflection forks; skip block-0). Run -discover after bor upgrades.

chains.name: polygon-amoy
chains.description: Polygon Amoy Testnet — fork hashes from bor AmoyChainConfig. Run -discover after bor upgrades.

chains.name: base-mainnet
chains.description: Base Mainnet (OP Stack) — timestamp fork hashes from Canyon through Isthmus. Run -discover after upgrades.

chains.name: base-sepolia
chains.description: Base Sepolia Testnet (OP Stack) — timestamp fork hashes from Canyon through Isthmus. Run -discover after upgrades.

chains.name: gnosis-chain
chains.description: Gnosis Chain (xDai) — fork hashes from genesis through Cancun. Run -discover to verify current dominant hash.
